\tzpentry{ID3748}{Coupled Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3748 introduces Coupled Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\hat{H}_{\\text{TZP-Comm}} = \\hat{H}_{\\text{TZP}} \\otimes \\hat{\\mathbb{I}}_{\\text{comm}} + \\hat{\\mathbb{I}}_{\\text{TZP}} \\otimes \\hat{H}_{\\text{entangle}} + \\lambda_{\\text{coupling}} \\hat{H}_{\\text{interaction}}$$
